name: porto-root
description: Porto Net Worth & Investment Tracker Workspace

scripts.dev: concurrently -n BE,FE -c cyan,magenta "npm run start:dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev:fresh: docker compose up -d && npm run dev
scripts.build:frontend: npm install --include=dev --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.build:backend: npm install --include=dev --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.copy:frontend: mkdir -p backend/public && rm -rf backend/public/* && cp -r frontend/dist/* backend/public/
scripts.build:all: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend && npm run copy:frontend
